Job Application Form

Pagel Activity Center

Complete this form to submit your application. Your application won’t be admitted until you click the “Done” button at the end of this form.

Question Title

* Which position are you applying for?

Question Title

* Name

Question Title

* Address

Question Title

* Email

Question Title

* Phone

Question Title

* What is your preferred way of contact?

Question Title

* Are you legally authorized to work in the United States?

Question Title

* How did you hear about this position?

Question Title

* Do you have any friends, relatives, or acquaintances working for Pagel Activity Center/Minnetonka Youth Hockey Association? If yes, please state name and relationship.

Question Title

* Upload your resume

Question Title

* Upload your cover letter (Optional)

Question Title

* LinkedIn profile URL

Question Title

* X/Twitter profile URL

Question Title

* Your personal website or blog URL

Question Title

* What is the highest level of education you have completed?

Question Title

* Please list the skills and qualifications you possess for the position for which you are applying:

Question Title

* Can you work nights, weekends, and non-major holidays?

Question Title

* What days are you available to work?

Question Title

* What hours or shift are you available to work?

Question Title

* Do you have reliable transportation to and from work?

Question Title

* Anything else you would like us to know about you?
